subject: fix(mobile): increase touch targets for mobile page controls and export buttons
body:
Improve touch target sizes on mobile to meet or approach the 44px minimum
recommended by Apple HIG and WCAG 2.5.8 for reliable finger interaction.

1. ContextBar page management buttons: w-10 h-10 (40px) → w-11 h-11 (44px)
   on mobile. Affects move, duplicate, add, delete buttons in the mobile-only
   pages row (sm:hidden block).

2. ContextBar PageDot: w-8 h-8 (32px) → w-10 h-10 sm:w-8 sm:h-8 (40px on
   mobile, 32px on desktop). Frequent page-switching action needs larger target.

3. ExportButtons format selector: py-1.5 (~28px) → py-2.5 sm:py-1.5 (~40px
   on mobile). PNG/JPG/WebP buttons were too short for reliable tapping.

4. ContentTab clear text button: w-7 h-7 (28px) → w-8 h-8 sm:w-7 sm:h-7
   (32px on mobile). Was the smallest interactive element in the app.

Tags: mobile, touch-targets, ux, accessibility
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
Semver: patch
